name: Soup Without Tears
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Nam prik pao (chilis paste in oil)
recipeInstructions:
1 Heat the sauce. Add the fish stock and nam prik pao, stirring to combine.
2 Add the shrimp and mushrooms. Cook until the shrimp turn pink.
3 Taste and adjust the flavor by adding fish sauce (salt), sugar, and possibly more nam prik pao.
4 You can of course vary these dishes with different main ingredients, chili pastes and so on. These three dishes served with a bowl of rice will feed 4-6 people well.
